title: S.O. 2746(E), dated 16/11/2012 - Appointment of Shri Pramod Chandra Mishra and Shri P. Satyanarayana Rao as Expert Members of National Green Tribunal.

Shri Prarnod Chandra Mishra, At : Srirarn Vihar, P.O. Jagruti Vihar, P.S. Buvla, Sarnbalpur-768020, Odisha. 2. Shri P. Satyanarayana Rao, Flat No. 30 I, Jyothi Meadows Apartments, White Fields Kondapur, Hyderabad-500084, Andhra Pradesh. [F. No. 17(5)120 I()"PLlNGT (VoL VI)] SURJlT SINGH, Jt.
